comment: "A thorough approach to the patient with sarcoma. Imaging and Biopsy, I found it new and interesting regarding psychosocial aspect."

"The course was very thorough, systematic and exhaustive. It gave insights into a difficult and controversial though vital aspect of Orthopaedics. I would recommend this course to all Orthopaedic surgeons as it will help them in treating patients in a systematic manner."
"General and clear about bone tumor approach."
